shell.title: Accounting settings
shell.description: Configure ledger structure, posting rules, bank control, journals, and accounting readiness without mixing those controls into the operational cashflow workflow.

workspace.emptySelectionDescription: Select an account in the tree to inspect it.

manualAllowed.label: Manual allowed
manualAllowed.description: Accounts still open for direct manual posting.
manualAllowed.modalSubtitle: Accounts currently open for manual posting under the active filters.
manualAllowed.empty: No accounts allow manual posting in the current view.

bankControl.label: Bank control
bankControl.description: Accounts dedicated to settlement and bank control.
bankControl.modalSubtitle: Accounts marked for bank control under the active filters.
bankControl.empty: No bank control accounts found in the current view.

active.label: Active
active.description: Accounts currently available in the chart.
active.modalSubtitle: Accounts currently active under the active filters.
active.empty: No active accounts found in the current view.

mapped.label: Mapped accounts
mapped.description: Accounts with report group or subgroup assigned.
mapped.modalSubtitle: Accounts with report group or subgroup assigned under the active filters.
mapped.empty: No mapped reporting accounts found in the current view.

unassignedReporting.label: Unassigned
unassignedReporting.title: Unassigned reporting accounts
unassignedReporting.subtitle: Accounts without a report group in the current filtered view.
unassignedReporting.empty: No accounts found for this reporting group.

form.subtitle: Maintain structure, posting rules, and reporting classification from a dedicated side modal.

booksPage.requiredError: Code, name, and currency are required.
booksPage.title: Accounting books
booksPage.description: Create and maintain accounting books used as posting scopes for journals, bank mappings, and category policies.

metrics.primaryDetail: Books marked as the primary accounting base.
metrics.activeDetail: Books available for operational posting flows.

modal.subtitle: Create or update the accounting basis and posting currency.

bankMappingsPage.lookupError: Failed to load mapping form lookups.
bankMappingsPage.requiredError: Bank, book, and ledger account are required.
bankMappingsPage.title: Bank mappings
bankMappingsPage.description: Link operational bank accounts to accounting books and bank-control ledger accounts for reliable posting and reconciliation.

metrics.booksCoveredDetail: Accounting books already linked to banks.
metrics.uniqueBanksDetail: Operational bank accounts with mapping coverage.

modal.title: Bank mapping
modal.subtitle: Choose the operational bank account, accounting book, and bank-control ledger account.

postingPoliciesPage.lookupError: Failed to load posting policy form lookups.
postingPoliciesPage.title: Posting policies
postingPoliciesPage.description: Define how operational cashflow categories translate into ledger accounts for settlement, accrual, and clearing workflows.

metrics.settlementReadyDetail: Policies with full settlement pair mapping.
metrics.accrualReadyDetail: Policies with full accrual pair mapping.
metrics.withClearingDetail: Policies already linked to a clearing account.

modal.title: Posting policy
modal.subtitle: Define how one operational category maps into settlement, accrual, and clearing accounts.

journalsPage.lookupError: Failed to load manual journal form lookups.
journalsPage.requiredError: Book, dates, and at least one journal line are required.
journalsPage.title: Journals
journalsPage.description: Review accounting entries, create controlled manual journals, and reverse posted entries when needed.

metrics.entriesDetail: Journals visible in the current search slice.
metrics.linesDetail: Total journal lines across visible entries.

modal.title: Manual journal
modal.subtitle: Create a controlled accounting entry with balanced debit and credit lines.

reconciliationPage.title: Accounting readiness board
reconciliationPage.description: This area should act as the bridge between the operational cashflow layer and the accounting layer, surfacing what blocks posting, what is ready, and what needs review.
reconciliationPage.backendProposalText: Suggested endpoint: GET cashflow/accounting-readiness/, returning grouped queues by readiness state so this page can evolve from static guidance into a true operational board.

missingCategoryPolicy.title: Missing category policy
missingCategoryPolicy.description: Operational entries are categorized, but the category still does not translate into accounting accounts.

missingBankMapping.title: Missing bank mapping
missingBankMapping.description: Bank movements cannot post because the operational bank account is not linked to a bank-control ledger account.

readyToPost.title: Ready to post
readyToPost.description: Entries already have category, policy, bank mapping, and accounting context resolved for posting review.

postedWithException.title: Posted with exception
postedWithException.description: Entries posted successfully but still need manual review, reversal, or deeper reconciliation follow-up.

correlationsPage.loadError: Failed to load accounting correlation data.
correlationsPage.selectionRequired: Select a row to add it to the diagram.
correlationsPage.title: Accounting correlation map
correlationsPage.description: Explore how accounting settings pages, APIs, entities, and operational datasets connect to each other.

journals.label: Journals
journals.description: Accounting execution with lines and statuses.

bankMappingsPage.label: AccountingBankMappingsPage
bankMappingsPage.description: Bridge between bank accounts, books, and bank-control ledger accounts.

postingPoliciesPage.label: AccountingPostingPoliciesPage
postingPoliciesPage.description: Bridge between cashflow categories, books, and ledger accounts.

journalsPage.label: AccountingJournalsPage
journalsPage.description: Journal creation, review, and reversal page.

reconciliation.label: AccountingReconciliationPage
reconciliation.description: Readiness board fed by upstream completeness.

categoryEntity.label: CashflowCategory
categoryEntity.description: Operational category used in policy mapping.
